title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 514.240 - Tender without deposit stops interest or accumulation of damages
text:
514.240.  Tender without deposit stops interest or accumulation of damages. — Where tender and no deposit shall be made, as provided in section 514.230, the tender shall only have the effect, in law, to prevent the running of interest or accumulation of damages from and after the time such tender was made.
(RSMo 1939 § 1424) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1260; 1919 § 1712; 1909 § 2281
